thoughts_auth_1389198976556.content: Dual auth systems coexist: SessionStore/UserStore (SHA-256, session) and AuthService/JwtService (PBKDF2, JWT) — consolidate before adding new features.

facts_auth_1389205489940.content: JWT auth already fully implemented (HMAC-SHA256, rotation, blacklist, refresh) — the task is integration, not implementation.

facts_pipeline_1389206742146.content: HIGH complexity tasks (30+ files) trigger a risk gate that pauses the pipeline at plan stage — complexity scoring gates deployment.

thoughts_migrations_1389207805998.content: New JWT fields (jwt_secret, exp, iat) require database migrations — schema changes must be applied before middleware swaps.

facts_authrbac_1389208988388.content: RBAC roles (admin/editor/viewer) must be layered onto the JWT payload — define role claims before updating middleware.
